description: Shared buffer-mode streaming conformance fixtures generated from the normative Python guard in sdk/python/.../_adapters/_sse.py. Every SDK that guards a streaming chat-completion surface must reproduce these outcomes exactly.

assemble.name: allow_text_only
assemble.description: Plain text completion across deltas, finishes with stop.

assemble.name: allow_tool_call_fragments
assemble.description: Tool call with name/id in first fragment and arguments split across chunks.

assemble.name: allow_two_tool_calls
assemble.description: Two parallel tool calls keyed by index merge in index order.

assemble.name: allow_comments_and_keepalive
assemble.description: Comment and keepalive lines are ignored, content still assembles.

assemble.name: fail_malformed_json
assemble.description: A data event with malformed JSON fails closed.
assemble.error_message: Streaming response contained malformed SSE JSON.

assemble.name: fail_non_object_chunk
assemble.description: A JSON data event that is not an object fails closed.
assemble.error_message: Streaming SSE chunk must be a JSON object.

assemble.name: fail_multichoice
assemble.description: More than one choice in a chunk fails closed.
assemble.error_message: Multi-choice streaming responses are not guarded.

assemble.name: fail_second_choice_index
assemble.description: A choice with a non-zero index fails closed.
assemble.error_message: Multi-choice streaming responses are not guarded.

assemble.name: fail_data_after_done
assemble.description: A data event after [DONE] fails closed.

assemble.name: fail_unrepresented_choice_field
assemble.description: A non-null unknown field on the choice fails closed because it would leak unevaluated data.

assemble.name: fail_unrepresented_delta_field
assemble.description: A non-null unknown field on the delta fails closed.

assemble.name: fail_nonstring_content
assemble.error_message: Streaming delta content must be a string.

assemble.name: fail_nonstring_tool_args
assemble.error_message: Streaming tool_call arguments must be strings.

assemble.name: fail_tool_call_no_index
assemble.description: A tool_call fragment without an integer index fails closed.
assemble.error_message: Streaming tool_call fragments require an integer index.

assemble.name: fail_empty_no_chunks
assemble.description: A stream with only [DONE] and no data chunks fails closed.
assemble.error_message: Streaming response contained no data chunks.

assemble.name: fail_terminated_before_done
assemble.description: A stream ending before [DONE] fails closed.

synthesize.name: synth_text
synthesize.description: Transformed text response renders to a single chunk plus [DONE].

synthesize.name: synth_tool_calls
synthesize.description: Transformed tool-call response renders tool_calls into the synthesized delta.
